channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead baby fox, 12th July
item.description:
There is a dead baby fox

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barton Close, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recurring dumping, 12th July
item.description:
Outside Kingshold community centre on the public pavement there is recurring dumping of clothes almost every day for months now, which is a hazard for pedestrians and attracts other dumpers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ainsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown bush onto the pavement, 12th July
item.description:
The bush has caused obstruction of the path way for pedestrians to walk its covering the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tuskar Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping of dog litter on the side public wall, 12th July
item.description:
Dog walkers are dumping dog waste in bags on the side wall and this has been happening for months now
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tuskar Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A bin full of flys and maggots, 12th July
item.description:
A bin crawling with maggots with an awful smell when you walk past.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Oaks Avenue, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree and shrub pruning which has not been actioned for one year., 12th July
item.description:
There has not been any pruning of shrubs and trees in Woldham Place, which overhang into the road and tree outside houses 21,22 requires pruning as it is getting bigger and bigger.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woldham Place, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Redundant "recycling banks" sign, could be removed?, 11th July
item.description:
I think the recycling sign here is redundant and can be removed... On lamppost column (with number C51 03), at the junction of Crystal Palace Station Road with Ledrigton Road, there is "recycling banks" sign pointing up Ledrigton Road. But the recycling banks that used to be at the top of Ledrington Road have been gone for a few years, I think. So this sign could be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Station Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 9755933, 11th July
item.description:
9755933 check this job number as the glass is still there so not fixed , someone has pushed ot further to kurb but still there in the parking bay section outside post office nearest exit from station
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Glengall Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tree bases have ovegrown so much that they need to be trimmed down, 11th July
item.description:
The bottom part of the trees next to the bus stop have overgrown now and need cutting back please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sister Mabel's Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This area and surrounding pavements needs weeding, 11th July
item.description:
Lots of weeds in the marked area but also in a nearby pavements leading to Radnor Rd and on Radnor Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bournemouth Close, 11th July
item.description:
We found the graffiti on the wall behind the Atwell Street and front of Peckham palms front sode parkimg area. Please fix it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burger van, 11th July
item.description:
Burger van opposite kasiopi play centre has this caravan been dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colebrook Street, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pup fox on the grass at the top of the close, 11th July
item.description:
Pup fox got killed the other day not sure whether it was a badger or something else. But the little body is still on the grass opposite 33 I think. As you come into Lullingstone close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lullingstone Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lampost outside 82 Radnor avenue, 11th July
item.description:
The light is shining into 82 Radnor avenue. This is keeping people in the property awake.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radnor Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, pallet and a huge tree branch, 11th July
item.description:
A very big fallen tree branch, a mattress and a wooden pallet needs removing from current location ( on Peckham Hill Street by the Peckham library) Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163, Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti containing a slur, 11th July
item.description:
A racial slur which is aimed at black people has been graffitied on this stand. This increases racial tensions created by right wingers and also offensive and makes me as a black person feel uncomfortable and unsafe, considering this word was and is used as a form of verbal violence. This is located close to tunnel av on the footpath not too far from radisson RED London. Please may you remove it as soon as possible. Photo taken 5/07/26 @ 12.27

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TV dumped, 11th July
item.description:
A TV and box have been dumped in the road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vomit not cleaned over 10 days, 11th July
item.description:
There is excessive vomit on the stairs to Ocean house in Dalston square that had not been cleaned and is solidifying and attracting hoarded of pests and bugs and insects. Can this please be urgently cleaned - the whole stretch of stairs and ramp urgently
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big piece of wood, 11th July
item.description:
If piece of wood maybe part of a boat has quite large.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Terrace Walk, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Duchy Stteet, 11th July
item.description:
Fly tipping Duchy Street opposite the Nautical School.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duchy Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
